name: paperloom
description: Paperloom — local OCR + document tools webapp. Next.js + FastAPI + Ollama.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter paperloom-web dev" "cd backend && uv run uvicorn paperloom.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.mcp: cd backend && uv run python -m paperloom.mcp_server
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd backend && uv sync
